operations.value: Oral magnesium is an established approach for correcting mild to moderate magnesium deficiency, but improvement from repletion should not be generalized to people with adequate magnesium status or interpreted as proof that magnesium glycinate treats sleep, anxiety, or muscle symptoms.
operations.notes: Distinguishes mineral repletion from broader symptom-treatment claims.

sources.title: An Update on Hypomagnesemia and Hypermagnesemia

notes: Adds the clinically important deficiency/repletion context.
